notes: Treat this matrix as the checked-in runtime truth for generated-project onboarding.
Operator-local contours may rely on ignored local-private profiles, but they must stay classified as operator-local here.
Operator-local contours should route through docs/agent/operator-local-runbook.md or another project-owned runbook path declared in the matrix.
Project map, runtime quickstart, and onboarding docs should point here instead of treating env/local.json as shared baseline truth.
If a project adds an extra no-1C smoke contour, declare it via projectSpecificBaselineExtension and keep it separate from the template baseline.
